title: brassica rupestris
intro: Brassica rupestris, also known as wild rock cabbage or alpine cabbage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brassica rupestris are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or used as a raw ingredient in salads and other culinary dishes.
